For Eman 💕

❤️

Will You Marry Me (Again)?

My dearest Eman,
From the moment I met you, I knew my life would never be the same.

Every day without you feels incomplete. I miss your smile, your laughter, and every little thing that makes you, you.

How Much I Miss You

There isn't a moment when I don't think about you.
I wish I could tell you how much you mean to me in a million different ways, but words are never enough.

Will you be mine forever?
I love you, Eman ❤️

— With all my love,
Your Qasim
